svg.title: Object Diagram: Doctor Conducts Active Consultation with Patient

g.text: Object Diagram: Doctor Conducts Active Consultation with Patient
Dr. Sarah Lee conducts consultation with John Tan
about chest pain. Doctor reviews history, examines patient, and
Content = "I've been experiencing chest pain for 2 days..."
Content = "Hello John, I've reviewed your symptoms and history..."
Content = "Can you describe the chest pain? Is it sharp or dull? Does it radiate?"
Content = "It's a dull, pressing pain in the center of my chest. Sometimes radiates to left arm."
Content = "Based on your symptoms, history of hypertension, and examination, I'm diagnosing Hypertension Stage 2 with angina..."
FollowUpInstructions = "Follow up in 2 weeks, monitor BP daily"
